metadata.name: vault
metadata.description: Solana Vault for managed liquidity on Raydium CLMM

instructions.name: accept_admin
docs: Step 2: New admin accepts the transfer

instructions.name: cancel_rebalance
docs: Emergency: cancel a stuck rebalance (if open_position fails after close_position).
Resets is_rebalancing = false so users can withdraw. Admin only.

instructions.name: close_position
docs: Close the active CLMM position and return funds to treasury.
Sets is_rebalancing = true (blocks user deposits/withdrawals until open_position).

instructions.name: collect_fees
docs: Collect accumulated trading fees from the position.
10% of fees → accumulated_protocol_fees. 90% stays in treasury (user profit).

instructions.name: decrease_liquidity
docs: Decrease liquidity from the active position

instructions.name: deposit_sol
docs: Deposit SOL into vault (price read live from Raydium pool)

accounts.name: raydium_pool
docs: Raydium CLMM SOL/USDC pool — price is read on-chain from sqrt_price_x64.
Must be the pool stored in vault.sol_price_feed (set by admin via update_price).

instructions.name: deposit_usdc
docs: Deposit USDC into vault (price read live from Raydium pool)

accounts.name: raydium_pool
docs: Raydium CLMM SOL/USDC pool — price is read on-chain from sqrt_price_x64.
Must be the pool stored in vault.sol_price_feed (set by admin via update_price).

instructions.name: extract_protocol_fee
docs: Extract accumulated protocol fees (10% of collected fees) to protocol_wallet

accounts.name: protocol_sol_account
docs: Protocol wallet SOL (wSOL) token account — destination for SOL fees.

accounts.name: protocol_usdc_account
docs: Protocol wallet USDC token account — destination for USDC fees.

instructions.name: increase_liquidity
docs: Increase liquidity in the active position

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize vault with treasury PDAs, share mint, protocol wallet, and Pyth price feed

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin who will manage the vault

instructions.name: migrate_vault
docs: One-time migration: upgrades vault account layout after program upgrade.
Reallocs to Vault::LEN, preserves discriminator, sources state from
actual on-chain token accounts. Admin only.

accounts.name: vault
docs: layout is incompatible with the new Vault struct.  The PDA address is
verified via seeds + canonical bump.  The admin authority is verified
from raw bytes inside the handler.

accounts.name: share_mint
docs: Share mint PDA — supply read for total_shares

accounts.name: sol_treasury
docs: SOL (wSOL) treasury PDA — amount read for treasury_sol

accounts.name: usdc_treasury
docs: USDC treasury PDA — amount read for treasury_usdc; mint key stored in vault

instructions.name: open_position
docs: Open a new CLMM position with funds from treasury.
Also clears is_rebalancing flag (end of rebalance cycle).

accounts.name: position_nft_account
docs: Position NFT account (vault will own the NFT)

instructions.name: set_paused
docs: Pause or unpause the vault (user deposits/withdrawals)

instructions.name: swap_in_treasury
docs: Swap tokens within treasury via Raydium CLMM CPI (for rebalancing)

accounts.name: input_vault
docs: Input vault (Raydium pool vault for input token)

accounts.name: output_vault
docs: Output vault (Raydium pool vault for output token)

instructions.name: transfer_admin
docs: Step 1: Propose a new admin (current admin only)

instructions.name: update_price
docs: Set Raydium CLMM pool as SOL price source (admin-only, called once after upgrade).
raydium_pool: SOL/USDC Raydium CLMM pool address

instructions.name: withdraw
docs: Full withdrawal from vault (burn ALL shares, receive SOL/USDC pro-rata)

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: only admin can perform this action

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Invalid amount: must be greater than zero

errors.name: InsufficientShares
errors.msg: Insufficient shares for withdrawal

errors.name: InsufficientTreasuryBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient treasury balance

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Math overflow

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: Invalid mint address

errors.name: VaultPaused
errors.msg: Vault is paused

errors.name: RebalancingInProgress
errors.msg: Vault is currently rebalancing, try again shortly

errors.name: WithdrawalExceedsTreasury
errors.msg: Withdrawal exceeds available treasury — admin must call decrease_liquidity or close_position first

errors.name: PositionAlreadyExists
errors.msg: Position already exists

errors.name: NoActivePosition
errors.msg: No active position

errors.name: InvalidPosition
errors.msg: Invalid position

errors.name: NoPendingAdmin
errors.msg: No pending admin transfer

errors.name: StaleOraclePrice
errors.msg: Oracle price is stale (older than 60 seconds)

errors.name: InvalidOraclePrice
errors.msg: Oracle price is invalid (zero or negative)

errors.name: NoFeesToExtract
errors.msg: No protocol fees accumulated to extract

errors.name: InvalidTickRange
errors.msg: Invalid tick range: tick_lower must be less than tick_upper

errors.name: DepositTooSmall
errors.msg: Deposit amount too small (below minimum)

errors.name: NotRebalancing
errors.msg: Vault is not currently rebalancing

errors.name: SolPriceNotSet
errors.msg: SOL price not set — admin must call update_price first

errors.name: InvalidSolPrice
errors.msg: Invalid SOL price: must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidPriceFeed
errors.msg: Invalid price feed: must be the Raydium CLMM pool set by admin

types.name: AmmConfig
docs: Holds the current owner of the factory

fields.name: trade_fee_rate
docs: The trade fee, denominated in hundredths of a bip (10^-6)

fields.name: fund_fee_rate
docs: The fund fee, denominated in hundredths of a bip (10^-6)

fields.name: total_sol_fees
docs: Total SOL fees collected from Raydium

fields.name: total_usdc_fees
docs: Total USDC fees collected from Raydium

types.name: Observation
docs: The element of observations in ObservationState

fields.name: block_timestamp
docs: The block timestamp of the observation

fields.name: sqrt_price_x64
docs: the price of the observation timestamp, Q64.64

fields.name: cumulative_time_price_x64
docs: the cumulative of price during the duration time, Q64.64

fields.name: nft_mint
docs: Mint address of the tokenized position

fields.name: pool_id
docs: The ID of the pool with which this token is connected

fields.name: tick_lower_index
docs: The lower bound tick of the position

fields.name: tick_upper_index
docs: The upper bound tick of the position

fields.name: liquidity
docs: The amount of liquidity owned by this position

fields.name: fee_growth_inside_0_last_x64
docs: The token_0 fee growth of the aggregate position as of the last action on the individual position

fields.name: fee_growth_inside_1_last_x64
docs: The token_1 fee growth of the aggregate position as of the last action on the individual position

fields.name: token_fees_owed_0
docs: The fees owed to the position owner in token_0, as of the last computation

fields.name: token_fees_owed_1
docs: The fees owed to the position owner in token_1, as of the last computation

fields.name: token_mint_0
docs: Token pair of the pool, where token_mint_0 address < token_mint_1 address

fields.name: tick_spacing
docs: The minimum number of ticks between initialized ticks

fields.name: liquidity
docs: The currently in range liquidity available to the pool.

fields.name: sqrt_price_x64
docs: The current price of the pool as a sqrt(token_1/token_0) Q64.64 value

fields.name: tick_current
docs: The current tick of the pool, i.e. according to the last tick transition that was run.

fields.name: observation_index
docs: the most-recently updated index of the observations array

fields.name: fee_growth_global_0_x64
docs: The fee growth as a Q64.64 number, i.e. fees of token_0 and token_1 collected per
unit of liquidity for the entire life of the pool.

fields.name: protocol_fees_token_0
docs: The amounts of token_0 and token_1 that are owed to the protocol.

fields.name: swap_in_amount_token_0
docs: The amounts in and out of swap token_0 and token_1

fields.name: status
docs: Bitwise representation of the state of the pool
bit0, 1: disable open position and increase liquidity, 0: normal

fields.name: emissions_per_second_x64
docs: Q64.64 number indicates how many tokens per second are earned per unit of liquidity.

fields.name: reward_total_emissioned
docs: The total amount of reward emissioned

fields.name: reward_claimed
docs: The total amount of claimed reward

fields.name: authority
docs: The owner that has permission to set reward param

fields.name: reward_growth_global_x64
docs: Q64.64 number that tracks the total tokens earned per unit of liquidity since the reward

fields.name: liquidity_net
docs: Amount of net liquidity added (subtracted) when tick is crossed from left to right (right to left)

fields.name: liquidity_gross
docs: The total position liquidity that references this tick

fields.name: fee_growth_outside_0_x64
docs: Fee growth per unit of liquidity on the _other_ side of this tick (relative to the current tick)
only has relative meaning, not absolute — the value depends on when the tick is initialized

types.name: Vault
docs: Main Vault account - stores global state

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin who can manage positions and vault settings

fields.name: share_mint
docs: SPL Token mint for vault shares

fields.name: sol_treasury
docs: PDA that holds SOL (wrapped as wSOL)

fields.name: protocol_wallet
docs: Wallet that receives protocol fees (10% of position trading fees)

fields.name: sol_price_feed
docs: Pyth SOL/USD price feed account address (set at initialize)

fields.name: treasury_sol
docs: Total SOL in treasury (lamports) — includes accumulated_protocol_fees_sol

fields.name: treasury_usdc
docs: Total USDC in treasury (6 decimals) — includes accumulated_protocol_fees_usdc

fields.name: position_mint
docs: Active position NFT mint (Pubkey::default() if no position)

fields.name: has_active_position
docs: Whether there's an active CLMM position

fields.name: position_sol
docs: SOL deposited into active position at open time (lamports, approximation)

fields.name: position_usdc
docs: USDC deposited into active position at open time (6 decimals, approximation)

fields.name: position_pool_id
docs: Pool ID for the active position

fields.name: is_paused
docs: Whether the vault is paused (user deposits/withdrawals disabled)

fields.name: is_rebalancing
docs: True during rebalance (between close_position and open_position).

fields.name: pending_admin
docs: Pending admin for two-step admin transfer

fields.name: accumulated_protocol_fees_sol
docs: Accumulated SOL protocol fees not yet extracted (lamports).
EXCLUDED from TVL — belongs to protocol, not to users.

fields.name: accumulated_protocol_fees_usdc
docs: Accumulated USDC protocol fees not yet extracted (6 decimals).
EXCLUDED from TVL — belongs to protocol, not to users.

fields.name: sol_price_usd
docs: Cached SOL price in USD (6 decimals, e.g. 150_000_000 = $150.00).
Set by admin via update_price. Used for share minting on deposit.

fields.name: last_price_update
docs: Unix timestamp of the last update_price call.
